title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (during Update all)
scenario: Placing earbuds in charging case during case firmware update via "Update All" triggers Houston error screen on Poly Studio Mobile app with Voyager Free 60+
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
Ensure Voyager Free 60+ earbuds are connected and paired.
Navigate to Home screen and locate the device card for Voyager Free 60+.
Tap on 'Update All' to initiate a 1-step DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
During the update, when the charging case firmware is being updated, place the earbuds back into the charging case.
Observe the app screen for any error or issue display.
expected: The DFU process should continue without interruption, or the app should gracefully handle the earbuds being placed in the case and show a clear, non-error message (e.g., 'Update paused' or 'Please keep earbuds out of case during update').
